attributes.heading: Member Discounts
attributes.subtitle: Partner deals for members.
attributes.bodyHtml:
We’ve partnered with community businesses and organizations to bring discounts to our members. Present your membership ID and member-profile screen at the counter to receive these benefits. If you know of a business whose services our members frequently use, contact any Club Leader — we’ll see what we can do to add it.

Outdoorly

An online outdoor gear shop with exclusive member discounts across big-name and startup brands — Mammut, Grivel, Nalgene, Nathan, Obermeyer, Weston and more. Instructors and activity leaders get an even larger code (ask your Activity Chair).

Member code: SPMTNER-MEM-OUT — please don’t share outside the membership.

Sign up at Outdoorly →

Wild Walls Climbing Gym

Spokane’s downtown climbing gym — top-rope, lead, and bouldering. Monthly membership is $55 for Spokane Mountaineers members (regularly $70).

202 W 2nd Ave, Spokane, WA

Visit Wild Walls →

Bloc Yard Bouldering Gym

A family-friendly bouldering gym with member-rate monthly memberships: Adult $47.20 (reg. $59), Student $39.20 (reg. $49), Family of 3 by EFT $103.20 (reg. $129), plus $10/month per additional family member.

233 E Lyons Ave, Spokane, WA

Visit Bloc Yard →

Coeur Climbing Company

$10 off a gym membership with the initiation fee waived — show your member profile. Watch for member-only events. A great option for our North Idaho members.

764 S. Clearwater Loop, Suite 101, Post Falls, ID

Visit Coeur Climbing →

Solnix

15% off one full-priced item in store for current members (some exclusions). Now carrying climbing gear — Mammut, Black Diamond, La Sportiva, with Scarpa coming soon — and happy to special-order from those brands.

4505 N Division St, Spokane, WA

Visit Solnix →

Evergreen Gear Exchange

A new-and-consignment outdoor store in Spokane. Members receive a $25 voucher (just show your member profile), and you can name the Spokane Mountaineers as the beneficiary of their “Consign for a Cause” program.

1007 E Trent Ave, Spokane, WA

Visit Evergreen Gear Exchange →

attributes.description: Partner discounts available to Spokane Mountaineers members.
